seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Killarney Heights and Killawarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Killarney Heights vs Killawarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Killarney Heights and Killawarra.
heading: Killarney Heights vs Killawarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Killarney Heights, New South Wales and Killawarra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Killawarra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Killarney Heights (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Killarney Heights or Killawarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Killarney Heights has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Killawarra scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Killarney Heights scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Killawarra scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Killarney Heights or Killawarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Killawarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
